Question: Repeat Example 8.10 when the particle’s mechanical energy is $$+ 0.25 \text{J.}$$
Answer: a. yes, motion confined to $$-1.055 \text{m} \le x \le 1.055 \text{m}$$ ; b. same equilibrium points and types as in example

Question: Find $$x ( t )$$ for the mass-spring system in Example 8.11 if the particle starts from $$x_{0} = 0$$ at $$t = 0 .$$ What is the particle’s initial velocity?
Answer: $$x ( t ) = \text{unicode[:+-]} \sqrt{( 2 E \text{/} k )} \text{sin} [ ( \sqrt{k \text{/} m} ) t ] \text{and} v_{0} = \text{unicode[:+-]} \sqrt{( 2 E \text{/} m )}$$
